creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
According to 

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/x11-wm.html#epplets

the port x11-wm/epplets has an unfetchable distfile.  The directory layout
for the ftp site changed.  The diff below fixes this.

NOTE: the maintainer, nakai@freebsd.org has been CC'd as part of this PR
